title: INE Spain — Encuesta de Presupuestos Familiares (Household Budget Survey): average expenditure per household/person by expenditure group and quintile
time_coverage: annual, back to early 2000s through 2023 (exact start year embedded in file)
units: EUR and percentage distribution, described in INE metadata
license_terms: INE public statistics, free reuse with attribution
notes: Spain's HEIS/household-expenditure-survey equivalent (EPF, base 2006 methodology). Table 24900: average expenditure per household, average expenditure per person, and expenditure distribution (vertical/horizontal %) by COICOP expenditure group and expenditure quintile. Downloaded via INE JaxiT3 CSV bulk-download endpoint, English headers.
